reference: Hi, I was exercising the other day and was standing up, leaning from side to side, essentially doing side crunches. Well, the next day my middle back was killing me, like I bruised my spine. It hurts to the touch, and when I sit down or lie on the floor and try to stretch my back out, I feel a weird sensation, like pressure on my spine in that area. Do you think I just overdid it, or does it sound like I really injured something?
text: Hi, I was exercise other day and was standing up leaning from side to side, essentially doing side crunches. While the next day, my middle back was killing me like I bruised my spine. It hurts to the touch, and when I sit down or lie on the floor and try to stretch my back out, I feel a weird sensation like pressure on my spine in that area. Do you think I just overdid it, or does it sound like I really injured something?
